name: Parry
description: Scans tool inputs and outputs for prompt injection attacks, secrets, and data exfiltration attempts.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Dippy
description: Auto-approves safe bash commands using AST-based parsing while prompting for destructive operations.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Auto Prettier
description: Automatically formats files with Prettier after Claude edits them, keeping your codebase consistently styled.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Desktop Notifier
description: Sends native macOS or Linux desktop notifications when Claude needs your attention or finishes a task.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Context Re-injector
description: Re-injects your project context and working conventions into Claude's session after context compaction.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Test Runner
description: Runs your test suite automatically after Claude modifies code files, surfacing failures immediately.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Git Branch Guard
description: Prevents Claude from committing directly to main or master, enforcing branch-based workflows.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Slack Alerter
description: Posts a message to a Slack channel when Claude finishes a long-running task or needs user input.
author: hesreallyhim

name: ESLint Auto-fix
description: Runs ESLint with --fix on files after Claude edits them, keeping lint errors from accumulating.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Sensitive File Guard
description: Blocks Claude from reading or editing .env files, credentials, and other sensitive files you configure.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Commit Message Enforcer
description: Ensures commit messages follow Conventional Commits format before allowing git commit to run.
author: hesreallyhim

name: TypeScript Checker
description: Runs tsc --noEmit after TypeScript file changes to catch type errors before Claude moves on.
author: hesreallyhim

name: Session Logger
description: Logs session start and end times, tool usage counts, and summaries to a local file for auditing.
author: hesreallyhim
